rule.name: mitre attack T1218 005 windows mshta remove usage
rule.description: Using MSHTA to call a remote HTML application on Windows
rule.query:

rule mitre_attack_T1218_005_windows_mshta_remove_usage
{
  meta:
    author = "Google Cloud Security"
    description = "Using MSHTA to call a remote HTML application on Windows"
    reference = "https://attack.mitre.org/techniques/T1218/005/"
    yara_version = "YL2.0"
    rule_version = "1.0"

  events:
    re.regex($e1.principal.process.command_line, `mshta.+http`)

  condition:
    $e1
}
